creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: Yes, we need to push this forward.  My original intention is to update OCaml to version 4.05 which should not break existing ports; 4.06+ introduced some more potentially disrupting changes which would require careful checking of consumers and/or another exp-run.  I was actually working on it since last December as Gerald had noticed, and need to get back to it (and other related PRs).
